description: Tier B compact JSON maps short response fields into the stable DeepClassification shape.
raw: {"sum":"官方公告摘要。","txt_ai":0.2,"img_ai":0.1,"com":0.3,"lq":0.1,"fr":0.8,"mr":0.4,"fc":true,"why":"需核對日期與官方來源。","imgs":[{"i":1,"note":"截圖含公告資訊。"}]}

informationQuality.explanation: 需核對日期與官方來源。

description: Fenced JSON is accepted only when the fence contains one strict object.
Tier B parser must not swallow prose wrapped around JSON because that hides response-format drift.
